answer_normalization.applied_to: both the parsed and the expected answer, every arm, the axis holdout and all three retention screens
answer_normalization.definition: re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip(), then re.sub(r'\s*>\s*', '>', s), then re.sub(r'\s*;\s*', ';', s)
answer_normalization.rationale: 21 correct-but-rejected whitespace rows across the three prior gate events (seeds 88014/88015/88016), recorded in experiments/qwen35_4b_axis_stack_readjudication_medium_pilot/analysis/three_event_failure_forensics.md; unchanged since the seed-88021 gate

code_pins_deferred.reason: these files carry orchestrator-filled TODO-PIN constants; each is authenticated by hash inside its own run receipt

consequence_statements.if_nonzero: nonzero fresh-instance u_feedloop transfer at 10x the failed dose is evidence that SCALE-PLUS-DIVERSITY reopens the family (C43: the 80-row install was data-limited; the 10x dose is the dominant delta, but formalism diversity doubled 4->8 with it, so this is not a pure dose-response isolate), even without promotion
consequence_statements.if_zero: a 0 at 10x the failed dose closes the dose-scale mechanism class AND the added-diversity variant together for the feedback-loop skill on this parent

training_streams.covered_by_construction: streams are composed solely of sft_blend.jsonl replay rows and the feedloop treatment corpus, both checked above
training_streams.policy: zero canonical user-message overlap enforced against every stream file that exists, at generation time and at --check time

prerequisites.arm_training_and_merge_receipts: deferred: authenticated at merge/eval time via merge_trained_arm.validate_published_merge

run_order.policy: arm-major: for each arm in the frozen order, the four input files ascending by seed — 12 authenticated engine events

seed_freshness.verified: 88037/88038/88039/88040 verified grep-fresh in seed contexts across experiments/, knowledge/, research_programs/, scripts/, configs/, and docs/ at design time (zero seed-context hits); 88033-88036 are the statechain cell's frozen gate seeds and sit immediately below this cell's block
